title: awesome
description: Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics.
notes: Awesome 列表总入口，发现各类精选资源的高层导航

title: public-apis
description: A collective list of free APIs.
notes: 免费 API 大全，可找到游戏设计相关的地图、分析等服务

title: awesome-python
description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources.
notes: Python 资源精选，需要 Python 工具/脚本时可快速查找

title: awesome-selfhosted
description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers.
notes: 自托管服务列表，可用于搭建资产服务器、分析工具等

title: the-book-of-secret-knowledge
description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.
notes: 实用资源大合集，包含手册、速查表、CLI/Web 工具等

title: awesome-mac
description: This project is dedicated to collecting high-quality macOS software and organizing them systematically by different categories for easy search and use.
notes: macOS 软件精选，可查找游戏开发/关卡设计相关 Mac 工具

title: awesome-vue
description: A curated list of awesome things related to Vue.js
notes: Vue.js 生态资源，构建 Web 端关卡设计工具或游戏仪表盘参考

title: every-programmer-should-know
description: A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about
notes: 开发者必备技术知识合集，拓宽游戏开发技术视野

title: Best-websites-a-programmer-should-visit
notes: 程序员实用网站列表（已归档），仍有参考价值
